examples.text:
Jean Béliveau jumped at the opportunity. For the past three years, Béliveau had
been walking from country to country, with the goal of circumnavigating
the globe on foot. This required sleeping in tents, strangers’ homes, and the
occasional jail cell along the way.

source.text: Do you really need to take 10,000 steps a day? - Shannon Odell

reviewSessions.example_text: Jean Béliveau jumped at the opportunity. For the past three years, Béliveau had been walking from country to country, with the goal of circumnavigating the globe on foot. This required sleeping in tents, strangers’ homes, and the occasional jail cell along the way.
reviewSessions.feedback: 未作出有效释义。结合例句，circumnavigating 指“环绕……一周、周游（地球）”。
missing_points: 在句中指徒步环游地球

reviewSessions.example_text: Jean Béliveau jumped at the opportunity. For the past three years, Béliveau had been walking from country to country, with the goal of circumnavigating the globe on foot. This required sleeping in tents, strangers’ homes, and the occasional jail cell along the way.
matched_points: 准确回忆出目标词 circumnavigating
